explanation: This is the original command and serves as a baseline for testing.
Uses an alternate name for net.exe (net1.exe) as specified in the Sigma rule.
Adds extra space between 'net1' and 'stop' to test insertion mutation.
Uses the full executable name with extra space after the executable.
Uses tabs instead of spaces and quotes around the service name to test insertion and formatting.
Uses the full path to the executable to test path normalization and bypass detection based on file name only.
Tests substitution of 'UltraViewService' with a named parameter if supported by the target program.
Adds redirection to suppress output, testing omission of unnecessary elements.
